choices.text: Gas generator (Falcon Merlin) simple but loses gas; staged combustion / full-flow (Raptor, RD-180) efficient but complex; expander (RL10) self-pumping small; electric pump-fed (Rutherford) precise + new.

questions.explanation: Gas generator simple; staged combustion efficient.

choices.text: Multi-engine designs tolerate failure. Falcon 9 has 9 stage-1 engines — loses 1, still reaches orbit. Starship 33+6 engines tolerates several failures. Single-engine launchers = catastrophic loss on failure.
